wods.name: The Gauntlet
wods.description: 5 paired movements separated by 400m team runs. Start with a partner wheelbarrow, then run, squat, run, jump rope, run, wall ball, run, burpee. All athletes must finish each movement before the team advances.

movements.name: Partner Wheelbarrow 30 meters
standards: Athlete carrying the wheelbarrow may only hold the ankles of the wheelbarrow athlete.
Athlete's hands must start behind the line and go past the other line for the rep to count.
1 lap = 3m. 2 athletes working / 1 resting, switch however.

movements.name: Team Run 400 meters
standards: Athletes may only start running once they've finished the previous movement.
The team must leave the start line at the same time.
The team doesn't have to finish at the same time, but all athletes must return to their lanes before starting the next movement.

movements.name: 30 Team Squats
standards: Athletes doing the squat may carry their teammate however and may switch anytime.
Must start standing tall with hips & knees locked out, squat with hips below parallel, then finish standing tall with hips & knees locked out.

movements.name: Team Run 400 meters
standards: Repeat: same run rules as above.

movements.name: 60 Team Single Unders
standards: The rope must clearly pass below the feet of the jumping athlete for the rep to count.
Athletes may switch however.

movements.name: Team Run 400 meters
standards: Repeat: same run rules as above.

movements.name: 30 Partner Wall Balls @ 10 lbs
standards: Athlete A starts standing tall holding the med ball in front of the shoulders.
Squat below parallel, extend knees & hips, throw the med ball over the pull-up bar.
If the med ball touches any part of the pull-up bar, it's a no rep.
If athlete B fails to catch and the ball drops, they must let it settle before picking it up (no bounce catch).
The team may switch however.

movements.name: Team Run 400 meters
standards: Repeat: same run rules as above.

movements.name: 30 Burpee over Partners
standards: Athlete A performs burpee parallel to athlete B who holds a plank.
Chest & thighs must touch the floor, then jump over athlete B.
Standing tall before jumping is not required. Stepping during burpee is allowed.
Athlete B (plank) may raise/lower hips as long as only feet & forearms touch the floor.
The team may switch however.

wods.name: The Worm
wods.description: Three rounds of piggyback rides, worm cleans, synchronized knee raises, and worm push-ups. A true test of team coordination and trust.

movements.name: Piggyback Ride 200 feet
standards: Athlete A carries athlete B piggyback style, start behind the line, walk/run past the cone.
If athlete B's foot touches the floor during the ride, it's a no rep — go back to the starting line.
1 lap = 10 feet. The team may switch however.

movements.name: 15 Worm Cleans
standards: The team carries the worm from ground to shoulders in one movement, locking out knees & hips.
May perform a muscle or power clean. The team may switch however.

movements.name: 15 Synchro Hanging Knee Raises
standards: Athletes A & B hang side by side with hips locked out and heels behind the bar.
Raise knees clearly above the hip crease at the same time. Any grip is permitted.
The team may switch however.

movements.name: 10 Worm Push Ups
standards: Team starts lying on the ground in a straight line with chest & hips touching the floor.
Each athlete's feet rest on the next athlete's shoulders.
Perform a push-up locking out elbows. The team does not have to push up at the same time, but elbows must be locked at the same time at one point.
The team may switch places anytime.

wods.name: Triple Threat
wods.description: Three 2-minute AMRAPs in sequence with short rest between. Total combined reps across all three movements determine your score.

movements.name: 0:00 – 2:00 · DB Flat Bench Press @ 35/20 lbs
standards: Athlete lies on a bench with feet on the floor, holding DBs in line with shoulders, elbows locked.
Lower DBs beside chest with one head touching chest/shoulders, then press back to start.
Hips may not rise off the bench. Feet may not rise off the floor.

movements.name: 2:10 – 4:10 · Med Ball Feet Anchored Sit-ups @ 10/6 lbs
standards: Athlete lies on the floor, feet anchored by DBs, shoulders, hips, and med ball touching the floor.
Perform a sit-up and tap the med ball on the DBs. Hips may not rise at any point.
1 rep per successful tap.

movements.name: 4:20 – 6:30 · Russian Kettlebell Swings @ 24kg/16kg
standards: Kettlebell may start on the floor for the 1st rep or every time you break.
Swing the KB behind the legs, extend knees & hips, swing KB clearly above the shoulders.
Elbows may bend during the swing.

wods.name: The Jumbo
wods.description: A descending ladder of pull-ups paired with dumbbell reverse lunges. Fast and furious — 5 minutes to finish or hit the cap.

movements.name: 20 – 16 – 8 Pull-Ups
standards: Start from a dead hang with elbows & hips locked out.
Pull up with the chin clearly over the bar. Strict, kipping, or butterfly are allowed.
Heels must start behind the bar if performing a kip/butterfly. Any grip is permitted.

movements.name: 20 – 16 – 8 Front-Racked DB Reverse Lunge Steps @ 50/35 lbs
standards: Start standing tall with hips & knees locked out. DBs rest on top of shoulders/traps.
Perform a reverse lunge with the back knee touching the floor.
Return to start locking out the front knee & hip. Alternating legs is not required.

teams.name: Timtation ni ate Rona ft. Ken
